In United’s 2-1 aggregate win over FC Rostov in the Europa League on Thursday, Mourinho saw Paul Pogba limp off with a hamstring injury and Daley Blind substituted with what appeared to be a head injury, as United played an 11th match in seven weeks.

With Wayne Rooney, Anthony Martial and Bastian Schweinsteiger all doubtful, Mourinho will also have to manage without Zlatan Ibrahimovic and Ander Herrera due to suspension. The boss accepts the taxing schedule has taken its toll, particularly in Pogba's case.

"My teams' injury records are very, very good," said Mourinho. "It’s very difficult for my players to get injuries and obviously Pogba’s injury was due to an accumulation of fatigue.

"He felt something in the first half and, in the second half, he immediately felt like he couldn’t carry on. Even a physical monster like him couldn’t carry on. But, of course, he was one of the players who never had a rest.

"He played every game. Even at Blackburn [in the Emirates FA Cup], he was on the bench and he played half-an-hour. I think the Monday night game with 10 men also paid a price. So Paul is paying the price."

摩連奴說服費爵爺隨隊行動
在莫耶斯和雲高爾執教時期，費格信很少和曼聯一起行動。但摩連奴稱，“當費爵爺離開這裡的時候，他曾想過一去不再回來。我認為，也許是因為回到這裡會讓他有些難過。但當我來到曼聯後，他又回來了，他來見到了很多自己共事多年的人，他又和我們一起旅行。”

摩連奴表示，“我對費爵爺說'球隊乘坐火車去倫敦比賽，而阿歷士爵士你卻自己開車去，這是毫無意義的。你不要自己開車，和球隊一起坐火車。'他非常尊重我們，他覺得和球隊一起行動有些害羞，而我們必須讓他感受到被愛。”如今費爵爺已經和曼聯一起去客場觀戰，並且入住同一個酒店。

不過摩連奴透露，有一個地方是費爵爺不會去的。 “在比賽結束後，查爾頓爵士會來更衣室，CEO伍德沃德也會一起來，但阿歷士爵士沒有來更衣室。我已經說過，這絕對沒有特殊意義。”

摩連奴還談到了自己和費爵爺的關係，“我們的關係和過去一樣，在聖誕節、對方生日、重要比賽時會打電話發短信。”

費爵爺在2000年監督建設了曼聯的訓練基地，但摩連奴入主後對設施進行了一些改變。 “我們試圖不斷改善，讓訓練條件變得更加現代化。俱樂部是個巨人，但如果你停下腳步幾年，情況就可能變得複雜。”

ANTONIO VALENCIA: I FEEL LIKE I'M 21

Antonio Valencia insists he still feels 21 as he continues to press his claims for Manchester United's Player of the Year award.

The outstanding right-back won the Sir Matt Busby trophy in 2012 and has already bagged two Player of the Month prizes this term. Excellent against Chelsea in the Emirates FA Cup on Monday night and in Thursday's win over FC Rostov, the 31-year-old Ecuador international remains a top performer, more than a decade after arriving in England to join Wigan Athletic.

"I’ve changed in a lot of ways [since then] but with my willingness to keep on training hard, my hunger to keep on improving and my desire to want to remain here at United, I feel like I’m still just 21 years old," said Valencia in an exclusive interview for Inside United.

"I’m thankful to this great institution [the club] which has given me the chance to fulfil my dreams. And, of course, I’ll continue to fight hard to remain here for a bit longer!"

Jose Mourinho believes Valencia is one of the best right-backs in the world and it is a position he has embraced after initially signing for the Reds as a fleet-footed winger.

"Sir Alex would play me at right-back in a few games and I think he gradually began to realise that I could defend," the South American explained. "David Moyes also used me in that role in a few games.

"Then came [Louis] van Gaal and he played me there in a lot of games. I did a good job there and he continued to play me at right-back. Now the gaffer has come here and he’s given me the opportunity to keep working up and down that right-hand side which I’m enjoying."

摩連奴說服費爵爺隨隊行動
在莫耶斯和雲高爾執教時期，費格信很少和曼聯一起行動。但摩連奴稱，“當費爵爺離開這裡的時候，他曾想過一去不再回來。我認為，也許是因為回到這裡會讓他有些難過。但當我來到曼聯後，他又回來了，他來見到了很多自己共事多年的人，他又和我們一起旅行。”

摩連奴表示，“我對費爵爺說'球隊乘坐火車去倫敦比賽，而阿歷士爵士你卻自己開車去，這是毫無意義的。你不要自己開車，和球隊一起坐火車。'他非常尊重我們，他覺得和球隊一起行動有些害羞，而我們必須讓他感受到被愛。”如今費爵爺已經和曼聯一起去客場觀戰，並且入住同一個酒店。

不過摩連奴透露，有一個地方是費爵爺不會去的。 “在比賽結束後，查爾頓爵士會來更衣室，CEO伍德沃德也會一起來，但阿歷士爵士沒有來更衣室。我已經說過，這絕對沒有特殊意義。”

摩連奴還談到了自己和費爵爺的關係，“我們的關係和過去一樣，在聖誕節、對方生日、重要比賽時會打電話發短信。”

費爵爺在2000年監督建設了曼聯的訓練基地，但摩連奴入主後對設施進行了一些改變。 “我們試圖不斷改善，讓訓練條件變得更加現代化。俱樂部是個巨人，但如果你停下腳步幾年，情況就可能變得複雜。”
